description_long: This object is a sleek, modern airplane with a sharply angular, stealth-inspired design. The fuselage is faceted and tapers to a pointed nose, with a cockpit canopy that appears tinted and seamlessly integrated into the forward section. The wings are broad, flat, and sharply swept back, giving the aircraft a delta-like profile, and they are mounted at a mid-fuselage position. The tail section features a pair of canted vertical stabilizers, reminiscent of advanced military aircraft, and there is no visible horizontal stabilizer. The surface is finished in a dark, metallic gray with subtle reflective qualities, suggesting a composite or metal construction. No visible landing gear or external engines are present, contributing to the streamlined, futuristic appearance.
description: A stealthy, angular airplane with swept-back wings, canted twin tails, and a tinted forward cockpit, finished in dark metallic gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular fuselage, swept-back wing, and canted twin tail fins.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the broad, sharply swept wings and the pointed nose with a visible cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the angular body and wing structure, with the cockpit canopy visible at the front.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin canted vertical stabilizers and the absence of visible engines or landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept delta wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; engine placement not apparent.
attribute_tail_design: Twin canted vertical stabilizers in a V-tail configuration, no horizontal stabilizer visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage.
